name: Desert Ambush VR: Hold the Line!

reviews.review_description: The idea behind this game is interesting with great potential once few aspects are polished.physics has been well implemented especially during the combat system

Bad graphics, stuttering, graphical anomalies and more plague this game. Also why do all the NPCs have a odd blue glow? This game is just awful and then the first fight scene began 😆 and my hand fly away and I can barely get the gun, fire once, cant reach bullets. DO NOT BUY!! NO MATTER HOW CHEAP DO NOT BUY!! Oculus should remove this garbage

Maybe I'm too short? Lmao I'm 6' 1" I have over 500 VR games I do know how to adjust height 🤣  my hands fly away without doing anything because your game is bugged hot garbage not worth 50cents, only reason I can see that you have a decent score is fake reviewers probably all people you know 😆 fix this or move on to a job that better suits you

As for the graphics being the best on Q3 OMFG 🤣 they aren't even the best ive seen on my Q2 much less my Q3, dont lie

developer_response.body: The graphics are the highest quality possible on Quest 3, you can see in the trailer. Why do npcs have some blue glow? That's part of their outfit, it is magical. Everyone can use the gun and reach the bullets, maybe you are too short, you can adjust height in the settings. It is mostly a melee game, the guns are flintlock, very primitive. Your hand might fly away if you hit on something that collides with it, it is reacting like in real life, it is a physics game!

reviews.review_description: Not sure who these "people" are who wrote these reviews but this game is awful. It's buggy AF, lags and can't be arsed writing more. But one of the worst things (other than the AI narration who says "Dessert" and not "desert") is that you have to change your preferred settings every time you start a new scene! Stay clear of this one folks, unless you enjoy your hands jittering and wobbling about 5m in front of you 😂

developer_response.body: It's not so buggy, you need to get used to a physics-based game, the weapons have mass, there are physics reactions of collisions...

reviews.review_description:
Desert ambush is an exciting hack and slash adventure.
You can use a number of different weapons however I always felt myself drawn to the swords and getting amongst the action!

The game has a campaign mode leading you through multiple different scenarios as you battle your way to victory.

This game is loads of fun and definitely worth a look if you want some solid sword fighting.

While an early preview, this demonstrates a range of capabilities and interaction that is fun, vibrant and plenty of action.  The graphics are great and I'm keen to see where the game evolves.  

It really shows how much the developer loves the game and can really see the passion put into the game to deliver a quality result.
THIS GAME IS SO FUN YOU HAVE TO TRY IT
Good solid battle game to scratch that battle itch. early on so looking forward to more features I'd need to see more before giving a full 5 star review

Can’t wait for the full version!!!
Thank you for the early access

reviews.review_title: Start of a soon te be very decent game
reviews.review_description: Start of a soon te be very decent game.
Great game as told me from my friend refer.

This game comes from a solo dev. This is a melee brawler with a single player campaign. Fun fights and a great workout. While it may lack some polish from big studio I love indie dev projects and am excited to see where this one goes
Great Game with lots of action to keep you entertained!

Game mechanics are solid with room to improve 
 Loading into levels takes a bit of time, the graphics look pretty good too.

Looking forward to seeing what the devs have in store in the future
Fun game , intense action non stop, graphics is well and vibrant, working great in quest 3, def recommend trying
I just tried it out and I love it. Its so fun to be part of the fight :)
